content_body: The couples were blown away with the ambience of Fallen Timber Lodge. We loved this cabin so much that we are planning an additional trip in November. One thing that this group loved about this cabin was the convenience of having their own bathroom. With this three story cabin, each couple had the ability to have their own quiet time to reconnect and enjoy each other. Upon arriving home, all of my FB friends wanted to know either if they could come with us on the next trip or what was the information to visit that cabin itself. Money will spent! Can't wait to visit again in November.
title: Can't Wait To Visit Again
